packet_markdown:
# Element WeHo building packet

## Snapshot
- Building ID: element-weho-1425-n-crescent-heights-blvd
- Address: 1425 N Crescent Heights Blvd, West Hollywood, CA 90046
- Primary URL: https://www.elementweho.com/
- Management company: Moss & Company
- Recommended status: research_complete
- Last updated: 2026-03-22

## Scorecard
- Quiet: 3 (low, evidence count 1)
- Management: 3 (low, evidence count 1)
- Amenity: 4 (medium, evidence count 2)
- Community stability: 3 (low, evidence count 1)
- Location fit: 5
- Pricing transparency: 3

## Risks
- Structural noise risk: unknown
- Location noise risk: medium
- Security risk: low
- Pricing risk: medium

## Evidence summary
- [official] Official materials and the repo note support package concierge, controlled access, pool, gym, garage parking, and pets welcome. Source: Element WeHo official site (https://www.elementweho.com/). Note: Current official materials support package concierge, controlled access, pool, gym, garage parking, and pet-friendly terms.
- [review] Apartments.com and Zillow both continue to show in-unit washer/dryer and active inventory. Source: Apartments.com (https://www.apartments.com/element-weho-west-hollywood-ca/wn8k8ek/). Note: Third-party listings show active inventory and in-unit washer/dryer.

## Open questions
- Verify postal code, rooftop presence, and exact package-handling process after hours. Confirm EV charging and rooftop access or equivalent outdoor workspace amenity.

## Notes
Research complete, but still evidence-thin. West Hollywood fit is strong and the essentials largely appear present, yet EV charging, rooftop utility, and after-hours package handling remain unresolved in visible public materials.
